system.flavor: You cut the air in such a way that space itself is split.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 piercing damage. On hit: +1d3 piercing
Effect [X]: You may teleport one character in the line 1d3+1 spaces, but they must stay on the line.
Precision your attack target is 4+ spaces away from you, increase damage on hit by +2. If they are 7+, you may teleport them to any space on the line.
